---
title: "Your Name | Analytics"
subtitle: "Exploring data with R and Python"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true

listing:
  contents: posts           # automatically scans the /posts folder
  type: grid                # displays posts as thumbnail cards
  sort: "date desc"         # newest post appears first
  grid-columns: 3           # 3 cards per row (reduces to 1-2 on mobile automatically)
  image-height: "200px"
  categories: true          # shows filterable category tags above the grid
  feed: true                # generates an RSS feed at /index.xml
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
---
